74826.subject: Europe buys the future, America builds it
74826.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTJ9AAcAAAAAAutsmnAejs10mwyBMYj0BkZU9XbMOFpKEYDF5IVDlHEPo544_c3ygwngmuWvzcnbvLSS7ix8X95wsbRX8ZTADr3TH2T4an-qzaaE7U1WjQ4 

June 19th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTJ9AAcAAAAAAutsmnAgJlNo6YI8l9_EwxH77Rt7vkRAyw7_sMxqQzwJdW_wmsokWzq8sCSn1RwqUYiIg5Q8RC9zjBuZlmH6ifXz09Nyep7Bkb1feCC4gXI 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTJ9AAcAAAAAAutsmnAhni8mzEcU1K1pwNcJD3yCtm6tjPq86vLdSg2ouuXebeY0wOd0GnSevcypducit4UXvEWR2fdo7laLWvq8pDHGU7kQJekxDmIHGUY 



 
 

Bo Franklin

Senior digital editor



 A spat between Nobel prize-winners about how to compare Europe’s GDP with America’s has the feel of an economics World Cup final, writes our Free Exchange columnist. (Who says we can’t make economic analysis exciting?) The argument boils down to how far the old continent is falling behind. That it is at all should 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTJ9AAcAAAAAAutsmnAiWf7u2POtUcIJtzvEDzVTD93anQ0vWxXis3sIsPFaVis7yUaTXPghC2zq_0YfBYCmEV5xRk9SoZrbvfUDElFvAPVlWWbbdA 
make Europeans concerned .
 


 Credulous Westerners keep falling for love scams online, sending money to fake romantic partners. The author of a new book spent time with some scammers in Nigeria who exploit lonely people to bolster their meagre

AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-19-cryptobeholder-ndg3f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B2Jw%2FW541Tu2UmlBJ6jYZYQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=09UBtq4vQPack1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mql4wypt~8w-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mql4wypt-8w
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk-off dominates: Bitcoin's fourth straight drop and a record digital-credit selloff set a defensive tone, even as Franklin Templeton, Kalshi and US regulators push crypto's institutional and legal frontiers forward. 🔻 Bitcoin Slides Below $63K as Risk Assets Sell Off Bitcoin fell under $63,000 on Friday — its fourth straight daily decline — as a broad risk-off move erased the week's bounce in thin holiday trading. With oil down roughly 9% and the US-Iran deal easing the geopolitical premium, traders are now questioning whether this cycle delivers an altseason at all. Read full story → 🚨 Microsoft Warns of Crypto-Stealing Malware Spreading via USB Microsoft flagged newly discovered malware that hijacks crypto wallets and propagates through USB sticks. The worm hides inside shortcut files, harvests private keys from the Windows clipboard, and silently swaps in attacker-controlled addresses when it detects a transfer. More details → ⚖️ SEC and CFTC Open Public Comment on Perpetual Futures US regulators jointly opened a public consultation on how swaps and perpetual-futures products should be defined, just as the fight over crypto derivatives heats up. The move follows CME's threat to sue the CFTC over its approval of Kalshi's Bitcoin perpetual contracts, signaling existing rules may no longer fit the market. Read more → 🏦 Franklin Templeton Files Bitcoin DRIP ETFs That Reinvest Dividends Into BTC Franklin Templeton filed for two Bitcoin DRIP ETFs that automatically funnel stock dividends into Bitcoin, with a target effective date as early as September. The structure blends traditional dividend reinvestment with crypto exposure, deepening the bridge between conventional finance and BTC. See details → 📈 Kalshi in Early IPO Talks as Revenue Triples to $2B Prediction-market platform Kalshi is reportedly in early discussions with investment banks about a public listing after annualized revenue tripled to roughly $2 billion. The talks surface even as the firm's sports-related contracts draw mounting legal scrutiny. Read full story → 📉 Strive's Digital Credit Market Hit by Record Selloff Strive's digital-credit instruments STRC and SATA suffered a record selloff before partially rebounding, with CEO Matt Cole blaming forced selling by leveraged investors. He called it the most difficult day in

74822.subject: 🔷 The Daily: 'Most difficult day in the history of digital credit'
74822.body:
Morgan Stanley files amendments for ETH and SOL ETFs, revealing lowest fees in market | Fidelity launches GENIUS-aligned money market fund for stablecoin issuers | Ethereum could face core development 'funding crisis' within nine months, says former EF contributor | Base targets June 25 mainnet launch for Beryl upgrade and new B20 token standard |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Naga Avan-Nomayo

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Friday 🎉 It's a public holiday in the U.S., but we're still here to keep you updated on the industry that never sleeps.

In today's newsletter, *Strive* CEO *Matt Cole* says the *STRC* and *SATA* slide was due to leverage liquidation rather than a deterioration in fundamentals, *Morgan Stanley* files amendments for its proposed *ETH* and *SOL* ETFs, *Fidelity* launches a *GENIUS* -aligned money market fund, and more.

Meanwhile, *bitcoin* microtransactions now make up 80% ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405340/cryptoquant-bitcoin-micro-transactions-btc?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) of all daily transactions, according to *CryptoQuant*.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*📉 'Most difficult day in the history of digital credit': Strive CEO says leverage liquidation drove STRC and SATA selloff*

Bitcoin ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405406/strive-ceo-strc-sata?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Strive* CEO *Matt Cole* said a leverage-driven liquidation event, not deteriorating fundamentals, caused Thursday's sharp selloff in *Strategy's STRC* and *Strive's SATA* preferred stocks.

* STRC fell to a record low of $82.53, and SATA dropped to $92.88 before both rebounded sharply into the close on strong buying demand.
* Trading activity surged as STRC traded 10.6 million shares and SATA traded 1.57 million shares, both well above their typical daily averages.
* Cole said investors often borrow against digital credit instruments to boost returns, creating the risk of forced selling cascades when prices move lower.
* Strive maintained that its dividend reserves remain intact and said the company is well-positioned to continue executing its SATA strategy.
* Strategy and Strive use STRC and SATA to raise capital for *bitcoin* acquisitions through at-the-mark

>>>>>>>>>>

>>>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú
>>>>>>>>>> výzdobu a na základe toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste
>>>>>>>>>> mali záujem prosím navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>>>> aby sa časovo radi prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či
>>>>>>>>>> Prešova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas,
>>>>>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme
>>>>>>>>>> stret
